author: bcumming27
title: Fix Autoplay Already!!!
body: For months now, autoplay has not functioned correctly. An album or playlist will finish and playback goes to the beginning of the album or playlist. I switched from Apple Music to Spotify (years ago now) based solely on my perceived value of this feature for finding new music. The work around is to manually click through the options of replaying a single song and the arriving at open ended playback, but even that doesn’t consistently work! There are times when it’ll go to the next setting where it loops the album or playlist despite my attempts to change that! I’m well aware of the correct setting for this and yet my selection is not being correctly reflected in the apps functionality. It’s entirely unacceptable that this issue has persisted for so long. If it continues much longer, then I’ll probably jump back to Apple Music.
issue_categories: App Crashes / Freezing, Audio / Playback Issues, Search Functionality, Feature Requests

author: Dj Cinder
title: My favorite app
body:
I’ve been a Spotify Premium user since the platform first launched in the U.S., and at this point it’s honestly a daily essential in my life. I’m a high-time listener, easily 100,000+ hours a year, and Spotify delivers consistently. Whether I’m at home, in the car, or on headphones. The audio quality is rock solid across every setup I use, and I’ve never once had to question it.

What really keeps me loyal after all these years is the discovery experience. It’s effortless to find old favorites from years back while also getting introduced to new music that fits my taste almost perfectly. The recommendations feel smart without being repetitive, and the search function makes it easy to pull up exactly what I want in seconds.

After years of daily use, I can confidently say Spotify Premium is one of the best subscriptions I pay for. Reliable, high quality, and constantly evolving. I love the service and I don’t see myself ever switching.
issue_categories: Audio / Playback Issues, Subscription / Pricing, Search Functionality, Customer Support, Feature Requests

author: df9390
title: Music Repeats - Upcoming greed?
body:
Used to love this app but they’re starting to feel like they’re getting greedy. I keep getting emails that they’re going to charge more for their services. I don’t want to pay $30 to use your app. That’s crazy.

I use it daily, and you can have thousands of songs but it will consistently playback a handful of songs on a loop not actually shuffling thru the whole playlist. 

The DJ feature is ok but definitely needs work and for the money thousands of people spend, they should be on it.  
The discover weekly playlist that is supposed to recommend music off your likes typically recommends songs that I do not like at all. 
Occasionally if I finish a playlist the recommended songs that auto play are ok and that’s what helps me discover music closest to my taste. 

Unfortunately if they go up in prices anymore I’m just gunna switch to Apple Music or YT.
issue_categories: Audio / Playback Issues, Subscription / Pricing, Search Functionality, Notifications, Customer Support, Feature Requests

author: Spotify Seth
title: Unreliable
body: As the end of February 2026 just a month or 2 after Spotify users were told they will be charged an additional $1 and some change more monthly. The entire app goes to hell. It is slower than it ever has been and more jittery then ever. And on top of that can barely even handle simple tasks like pressing the play button which takes more than 2 minutes at times or resulting in restarting the entire app. I feel more scammed by this company as time continues. I used to love this app and preferred it over any other music app. If Spotify didn’t fix this problem soon. Not just me but a good chunk of Spotify users will be forced to switch to the competition because we are fed up with this slow and lousy app that we’re being overly charged monthly to have. Spotify is becoming shady. Beware

body: i have been a spotify user for almost 10 years!! i absolutely love the app! i strongly believe it is the best music platform! i do have an update idea though that maybe you can think about for the future. so i am a dance teacher and i make my playlist for my classes on the app. i think it would be cool to add a feature where you can add your own notes and comments to a song. maybe it can be seen underneath the song title on you playlist page? this is just an idea. it wouldn’t only be handy for dance teachers but maybe people can use it for all sorts of things. like reminding you lyrics you enjoy, regular teachers for educational songs, songs you want to show certain people, or if you need to pick a song for something you can write a reminder that you liked this song for your wedding or event! just an idea!! keep up the good work! love the app, no complaints!

author: wbeecha
title: From Free to Premium, What a Family Music Upgrade!
body: I used the free version for a few years and honestly thought that was as good as it gets. Then I finally upgraded to Premium and wow, it is a completely different experience. Being able to rewind and replay instantly, listen with zero ads, and search up virtually any song on earth in any genre feels like having the world’s biggest record store in my pocket. Add in the books and podcasts plus playlists that are genuinely tailored to what I like, and it becomes addictive in the best way. What really blows me away is how smart Spotify is. I will pull up an older song from a specific era and the next tracks are often perfect companions, sometimes even from the same time period and vibe. Whatever is running under the hood, the recommendation intelligence is incredibly good. And that is just the surface. The artist info, the lyrics, and the video toggle option are all beautifully done and make the whole experience feel rich, not just functional. One suggestion for Spotify: please show the year of release more clearly for every song, ideally near the top of the track info, maybe next to the trivia section. I find myself looking it up constantly. Bottom line: Spotify Premium has turned music into what it should be in our home for me, my wife, and our four kids.
issue_categories: Audio / Playback Issues, UI / Design, Subscription / Pricing, Search Functionality, Feature Requests

author: Ancpalm
title: They are killing their own company
body: The direction that Spotify is going is going to make their own app obsolete. The shuffle is horrendous since implementing an AI system. Why am I listening to the same 20 songs in a playlist with hundreds to almost a thousand songs. Why am I getting random songs “I listen to often” but have never chosen on my own. It makes it’s own choices on what it believes you would like that takes the data as if you played it yourself so you constantly get songs you don’t have an interest in. Also their atrocious ads for ICE is an actual joke. I’ve used and paid for Spotify for almost a decade and I hate to leave all of my collections behind but I’d rather restart from scratch then continue to support a company that fires their actual teams that made the app worth the cost than to channel money to some server system. Spotify this was all your own fault.
issue_categories: Audio / Playback Issues, Subscription / Pricing, Search Functionality, Customer Support

author: Makayla Blevins
title: Love this app
body: This app has many features that mke this app great. I love that you are able to listen to so many great songs, even without the subscription! And with the subscription, you can download millions of songs. One of the best apps in history!!!!
issue_categories: Audio / Playback Issues, Subscription / Pricing, Feature Requests

author: Jadekg190
title: Free Me
body:
I’ve been using spotify premium for almost a decade. i’ve never considered switching to another app until recently. PLEASE ALLOW ME TO LISTEN TO NEW MUSIC. 

there should be an option to turn off the algorithm. i used to be able to use song radios or playlists created by spotify to listen to new music. now im trapped in my own music taste with no way out. 

it’s too much work to sort through creator made playlists to find something interesting to listen to, and the playlists created by spotify have less than 10 new songs for me to listen to, with a playlist full of music that i’ve heard for the past decade.

PLEASE GIVE US THE OPTION TO TURN OFF THE ALGORITHM
issue_categories: Audio / Playback Issues, Subscription / Pricing, Search Functionality

author: Owls dermal
title: Amazing App
body: You can listen to music without having to pay . The music is also really good quality. A great option for people who don’t want to pay. Signing up is easy and the recommendations are amazing. Some of my favourite playlists have come from recommendations.
issue_categories: Audio / Playback Issues, Search Functionality, Feature Requests

author: Mmmmatb
title: It just gets worse
body: It won’t keep your spot well. Often freezes when playing adds. Every update seems to get worse.
issue_categories: App Crashes / Freezing, Audio / Playback Issues, Subscription / Pricing, Feature Requests

title: I LOVE Spotify❤️
body: Omg, I love Spotify it’s so good! I can find whatever song I want when I search it up and different versions! Also, I am absolutely HORRIBLE at making playlists so when I saw the AI create playlist I abviously did it and it gave me such a good playlist!

author: ChrisToeFur Penguin
title: On repeat & repeat rewind issues
body: Just asking for you guys to somehow correct the issue of my most recent songs that are on repeat..please have it where it is the actual song that’s in MY saved library that lands in both repeat playlists.

author: Elledubbb
title: PLEASE FLAG AI CONTENT
body: I’ve had Spotify for years but I do not want to engage or boost AI content. Now I have to check new artists I come across to see if I can determine if they’re real people or not before I add music to playlists. AI hurts the real artists on this platform among other things so this needs to be easily identifiable.
issue_categories: Performance / Speed, Audio / Playback Issues, Search Functionality, Feature Requests

author: Blah blee bloop
title: Do better Spotify!!!
body: I don’t understand why they have videos on this app. If I want to watch videos then I would go to YouTube. Make it an option to not have that feature! Also, I got a Spotify recommendation and it has a photo of a horror image, liquid death acct, and I don’t understand why I got that recommendation when I don’t listen to junk like that. No matter how many time I do the thumbs down, it won’t go away! That image is disgustingly disturbing. Again, wish there was an option to not see that. If this doesn’t change I’m canceling my subscription and deleting the app! This has become TRASH!
issue_categories: App Crashes / Freezing, UI / Design, Subscription / Pricing, Search Functionality, Feature Requests

author: hdndbsbsn
title: Can’t log back in
body: I use this on my computer and phone everyday. This isn’t the first time this has happened to me and probably won’t be the last. It keeps logging me out and I can’t log back in for a while. I have to reset my password a few times to make it work. It says my password or email is wrong but everything matches. This is starting to get annoying.
